headline: EQT (NYSE:EQT) Surprises With Strong Q2 CY2026
summary: Natural gas producer EQT (NYSE:EQT) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 13.2% year on year to $1.81 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.39 per share was 3.2% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
